rationale: The thesis moment — 'all content from ONE conversation' is the hook. Make it impossible to scroll.
css: .cls-__ID__-wrap { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1080px; height: 1920px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .cls-__ID__-pre { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 38px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px; } .cls-__ID__-word { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 148px; font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: -0.05em; line-height: 0.9; text-align: center; } .cls-__ID__-sub { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 34px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 18px; } .cls-__ID__-line { width: 120px; height: 4px; background: #7c6cfc; border-radius: 2px; margin-top: 24px; }
html:
all your content from
ONE
CONVO.
with Claude Code
initJs: el._tl = gsap.timeline({paused:true}); var wrap = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-wrap'); var pre = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-pre'); var word = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-word'); var sub = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-sub'); var line = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-line'); gsap.set([pre,word,sub,line], {opacity:0}); gsap.set(word, {scale:0.6, y:40}); gsap.set(wrap, {opacity:0}); el._tl.to(wrap, {opacity:1, duration:0.25}); el._tl.to(pre, {opacity:1, duration:0.35, ease:'power2.out'}, 0.1); el._tl.to(word, {opacity:1, scale:1, y:0, duration:0.55, ease:'back.out(1.8)'}, 0.25); el._tl.to(sub, {opacity:1, duration:0.4, ease:'power2.out'}, 0.7); el._tl.to(line, {opacity:1, scaleX:1, duration:0.5, ease:'power2.out', transformOrigin:'left center'}, 0.85); el._tl.to(wrap, {opacity:0, scale:0.95, duration:0.4, ease:'power2.in'}, 5.8);

rationale: The pivot of the video — 'content is ONLY HALF'. This is the pattern interrupt. Full-frame color takeover.
css: .cls-__ID__-fill { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1080px; height: 1920px; background: #7c6cfc; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .cls-__ID__-small { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 20px; } .cls-__ID__-big { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 200px; font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: -0.06em; line-height: 0.85; } .cls-__ID__-half-bar { width: 50%; height: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); border-radius: 4px; margin-top: 32px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .cls-__ID__-half-fill { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; height: 100%; width: 0%; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; }
initJs: el._tl = gsap.timeline({paused:true}); var fill = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-fill'); var small = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-small'); var big = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-big'); var halfFill = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-half-fill'); gsap.set(fill, {opacity:0, scaleY:0.05}); gsap.set([small,big], {opacity:0}); el._tl.to(fill, {opacity:1, scaleY:1, duration:0.2, ease:'power3.out', transformOrigin:'center center'}); el._tl.to(small, {opacity:1, duration:0.25}, 0.15); el._tl.to(big, {opacity:1, duration:0.3, ease:'power2.out'}, 0.25); el._tl.to(halfFill, {width:'50%', duration:0.8, ease:'power2.inOut'}, 0.6); el._tl.to(fill, {opacity:0, duration:0.35, ease:'power2.in'}, 4.3);

rationale: iX System intro moment — 'find target buyer, write outreach'. Show a visual pipeline, not just text.
css: .cls-__ID__-panel { position: absolute; bottom: 280px; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 0 54px; } .cls-__ID__-tag { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #7c6cfc; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px; } .cls-__ID__-steps { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .cls-__ID__-step { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; opacity: 0; } .cls-__ID__-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #7c6cfc; flex-shrink: 0; } .cls-__ID__-step-text { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .cls-__ID__-connector { width: 2px; height: 20px; background: rgba(124,108,252,0.4); margin-left: 4px; }
html:
iX System
Find target buyers
Write outreach copy
Book appointments
initJs: el._tl = gsap.timeline({paused:true}); var panel = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-panel'); var s0 = el.querySelector('#__ID__-s0'); var s1 = el.querySelector('#__ID__-s1'); var s2 = el.querySelector('#__ID__-s2'); gsap.set(panel, {opacity:0, y:30}); el._tl.to(panel, {opacity:1, y:0, duration:0.45, ease:'power2.out'}); el._tl.to(s0, {opacity:1, x:0, duration:0.35, ease:'power2.out'}, 0.3); el._tl.to(s1, {opacity:1, x:0, duration:0.35, ease:'power2.out'}, 0.6); el._tl.to(s2, {opacity:1, x:0, duration:0.35, ease:'power2.out'}, 0.9); el._tl.to(panel, {opacity:0, y:-20, duration:0.4, ease:'power2.in'}, 6.3);

rationale: 'Books appointments without you touching anything' — the power promise. Make it the visual center.
css: .cls-__ID__-scene { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1080px; height: 1920px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .cls-__ID__-block { text-align: center; padding: 0 60px; } .cls-__ID__-icon { font-size: 80px; margin-bottom: 24px; display: block; } .cls-__ID__-headline { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 96px; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 0.9; } .cls-__ID__-detail { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 30px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); margin-top: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
html:
🤖
RUNS
ITSELF.
zero human touches
initJs: el._tl = gsap.timeline({paused:true}); var block = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-block'); var headline = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-headline'); var icon = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-icon'); gsap.set(block, {opacity:0}); gsap.set(headline, {scale:0.5, y:20}); gsap.set(icon, {scale:0, rotation:-20}); el._tl.to(block, {opacity:1, duration:0.2}); el._tl.to(icon, {scale:1, rotation:0, duration:0.5, ease:'back.out(2)'}, 0.1); el._tl.to(headline, {scale:1, y:0, opacity:1, duration:0.55, ease:'back.out(1.5)'}, 0.35); el._tl.to(block, {opacity:0, scale:0.95, duration:0.4, ease:'power2.in'}, 5.3);

rationale: $4 billion in assets — this is the credibility proof. Biggest number = biggest visual.
css: .cls-__ID__-stage { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1080px; height: 1920px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; } .cls-__ID__-amount { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 220px; font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: -0.06em; line-height: 0.85; } .cls-__ID__-desc { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 20px; } .cls-__ID__-bar { width: 80px; height: 5px; background: #7c6cfc; border-radius: 3px; margin-top: 28px; }
html:
$0B
in assets managed
initJs: el._tl = gsap.timeline({paused:true}); var stage = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-stage'); var amount = el.querySelector('#__ID__-amount'); var bar = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-bar'); gsap.set(stage, {opacity:0, scale:0.8}); gsap.set(bar, {scaleX:0, transformOrigin:'left'}); el._tl.to(stage, {opacity:1, scale:1, duration:0.5, ease:'back.out(1.6)'}); el._tl.to(bar, {scaleX:1, duration:0.6, ease:'power2.inOut'}, 0.6); var obj = {val:0}; el._tl.to(obj, { val: 4, duration: 1.4, ease: 'power2.out', onUpdate: function() { var z=0.42, w=9, oD=w*Math.sqrt(1-z*z), t=this.time(); var v=4*(1-Math.exp(-z*w*t)*Math.cos(oD*t)); v=Math.max(0,Math.min(4,v)); amount.textContent='$'+v.toFixed(1)+'B'; } }, 0.3); el._tl.to(stage, {opacity:0, scale:0.95, duration:0.4, ease:'power2.in'}, 6.8);

rationale: 20+ partners + M&A advisories — close the credibility arc and drive the follow.
css: .cls-__ID__-bottom { position: absolute; bottom: 220px; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 0 60px; } .cls-__ID__-stat-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .cls-__ID__-num { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 100px; font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; } .cls-__ID__-label { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); } .cls-__ID__-cta { background: #7c6cfc; border-radius: 14px; padding: 22px 48px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; } .cls-__ID__-cta-text { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 800; color: #000; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .cls-__ID__-arrow { font-size: 36px; color: #000; }
html:
20+
partners running
the iX system
Follow for the full system↗
initJs: el._tl = gsap.timeline({paused:true}); var bottom = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-bottom'); var statRow = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-stat-row'); var cta = el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cta'); gsap.set(bottom, {opacity:0}); gsap.set(statRow, {y:40, opacity:0}); gsap.set(cta, {y:30, opacity:0, scale:0.9}); el._tl.to(bottom, {opacity:1, duration:0.3}); el._tl.to(statRow, {y:0, opacity:1, duration:0.5, ease:'power2.out'}, 0.1); el._tl.to(cta, {y:0, opacity:1, scale:1, duration:0.5, ease:'back.out(1.5)'}, 0.5); el._tl.to(cta, {scale:1.03, duration:0.6, repeat:-1, yoyo:true, ease:'power1.inOut'}, 1.2); el._tl.to(bottom, {opacity:0, y:-20, duration:0.4, ease:'power2.in'}, 5.7);
